creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This issue is misplaced here, because port doesn't affect bandwidth limitations.

If you are still experiencing the problem, please create the issue for libtorrent at https://github.com/arvidn/libtorrent, for Deluge at https://dev.deluge-torrent.org/roadmap, or both.

Please reopen if you still think that the problem is in the port,
